breakdown: This PR refactors rewards box normalization to use a centralized Defensive Numeric Converter (_DNC) with a helper function _get_raw for robust value extraction with fallbacks. It handles messy LLM outputs including NaN, inf, empty strings, and various key aliases. The changes simplify chaining logic and add a new test file covering edge cases. Strengths include good test coverage and architectural separation; weaknesses include using Any type and limited explicit exception handling in the helper function.
key_changes: Add _get_raw helper function with fallback logic for multiple key aliases
Handle edge cases: NaN, inf, empty strings, and zero as zero candidates
Simplify normalization by replacing multiple coerce_int calls with unified converter
Add test_rewards_box_robustness.py with E2E and internal unit tests for edge cases
